scripts.build:android: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk
scripts.build:apk: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:gerant: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk-gerant --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:client: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk-client --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:livreur: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk-livreur --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:assistant: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk-assistant --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:preview: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile preview --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p ios --profile ios-internal --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios:gerant: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p ios --profile ios-gerant --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios:client: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p ios --profile ios-client --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios:livreur: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p ios --profile ios-livreur --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios:assistant: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p ios --profile ios-assistant --non-interactive
scripts.build:mobile: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build --profile mobile --platform all
scripts.eas:sync:maps:verify: npm run eas:sync:maps && npm run release:check
scripts.eas:prebuild: npm run release:check && npm run validate:expo
scripts.eas:update:client: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel client --platform android --message "Mise a jour Husko Client" --non-interactive
scripts.eas:update:gerant: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel gerant --platform android --message "Mise a jour Husko Gerant" --non-interactive
scripts.eas:update:livreur: cross-env EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel livreur --platform android --message "Mise a jour Husko Livreur" --non-interactive
scripts.release:doctor: npm run security:check:strict && npm run eas:prebuild
scripts.verify: npx tsc --noEmit && npx expo lint && npm run validate:expo
scripts.verify:all: npm run preflight && npm run verify
scripts.test:ci: npm run verify:all && npx expo export --platform web
